title: Kobresia dregeana
taxonomy: Kobresia dregeana is classified as a member of the family Cyperaceae, commonly known as the sedge family. It belongs to the genus Kobresia, which consists of various species of sedges. As a member of the family Cyperaceae, Kobresia dregeana is closely related to other sedge species, such as Kobresia myosuroides. Within the genus Kobresia, Kobresia dregeana is further classified into a specific species due to its unique characteristics. The classification of Kobresia dregeana helps to understand its evolutionary history and relationships with other plant species.
